ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-09-2008 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: DONALD FIELD, APPEARING FOR PETITIONER; JOHNATHAN FERDON APPEARING FOR THE PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR
THE PROPOSED PETITIONERS ARE NOT QUALIFIED TO SERVE. COUNSEL STATES THAT THE DECEDENT WAS POSSILBY MURDERED AND THAT AT THE MONMENT THE POLICE HAVE DEEMED THE DEATH "SUSPICIOUS". THE COURT TO APPONT THE PUBLIC ADMINISTRATOR(PA) TO SERVE. IF THE THE PROPOSED PETITONERS WISH TO FILE A WRONGFUL DEATH PETITION AT A LATED, THE "PA" MAY CHOOSE NOT TO SERVE. MR. FERDON TO PREPARE ORDER.

JUDGE: JOHN DEARMAN;REPORTER:KATY BERSAMIN, CSR#11722;CLERK:LARRISA DOTSON;BALIFF:M.LOOS
